description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in CMSLogik 1.2.0 and 1.2.1 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the (1) admin_email, (2) header_title, (3) site_title parameter to admin/settings; (4) recaptcha_private or (5) recaptcha_public parameter to admin/captcha_settings; (6) fb_appid, (7) fp_secret, (8) tw_consumer_key, or (9) tw_consumer_secret parameter to admin/social_settings; (10) slug parameter to admin/gallery/save_item_settings; or (11) item_link parameter to admin/edit_menu_item_ajax.  NOTE: this issue might be resultant from CSRF.
